ques: How much does it cost to buy a Macbook pro, 16-inch, Apple M4 Max chip with 16-core CPU, 40-core GPU, 64GB unified memory, 1TB SSD.
answer: $4,199 (MacBook Pro 16-inch, M4 Max 16-core CPU/40-core GPU, 64GB memory, 1TB SSD — original new price; base $3,999 with 48GB + $200 for the 64GB upgrade). Note: this M4 Max config is no longer sold new on apple.com, which has moved to the M5 generation.
